The '''Naboo whale''' was an aquatic creature native to the southernmost [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. They were hunted by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] company [[Binks & Son Whaling Company]] for hundreds of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] was born. On a whaling trip when Jar Jar was hunting with his father, [[Jar Ja Binks's father|George R. Binks]], they came across a whale and harpooned it before Jar Jar's poor steering caused their ship to crash into it.

==Appearances==
